config.title: Documentic Markdown
config.untrustedMarkdownProtection.descr: Protection mode for untrusted Markdown. When true, Kroki rendering and raw HTML rendering are blocked.
config.allowRawHtml.description: Allow raw HTML in Markdown. Effective only when untrustedMarkdownProtection is false.
config.includeKroki.description: Enable Kroki-supported code block conversion to SVG (including PlantUML/UML). Effective only when untrustedMarkdownProtection is false.
config.openOutputAfterExport.description: Open output after export (PDF/HTML with external browser, PNG with system default app).
config.renderTimeoutMilliSecond.descript: Timeout (milli second) for waiting Mermaid/Math rendering before export.
config.browserExecutablePath.description: Absolute path to a Chromium-based browser executable (Chrome/Edge). If empty, the extension tries common install locations.
config.pngQuality.description: PNG quality preset. low=1x, medium=2x, high=3x resolution scale.
